parameters.url: =https://api.github.com/repos/{{ $('Github Failure Webhook').first().json.body.repo }}/compare/{{ $('Github Failure Webhook').first().json.body.commit }}~1...{{ $('Github Failure Webhook').first().json.body.commit }}

values.content:
You are an expert DevOps engineer and Node.js developer. 

TASK:
Analyze the provided CI/CD failure logs and the source code. Identify the bug and provide a complete fix.

CONSTRAINTS:
1. Return ONLY a raw, valid JSON object. 
2. NO markdown, NO code blocks (```json), NO conversational text.
3. The "branch_name" MUST be unique and specific to the fix (e.g., "ai-fix/missing-express-init"). DO NOT use "main" or "master".
4. The "fixed_code" MUST be the entire file content with the fix applied.

JSON SCHEMA:
{
  "branch_name": "ai-fix/brief-description-of-fix{{ $now.toFormat('yyyyMMdd-HHmmss') }}",
  "file_path": "the/actual/path/of/the/file/fixed.js",
  "fixed_code": "entire updated file content",
  "pr_title": "fix: brief title of the bug fix",
  "pr_body": "## AI Auto-Fix\n\n**Root Cause Identified:**\n[Brief description]\n\n**Changes Applied:**\n[List of changes]"
}

parameters.subject: =CICD Failure: Fixed by AI - {{ $json.title }}
parameters.message: = Hello, The AI Self-Healing Pipeline has automatically detected and fixed a CI/CD failure in your repository.  Repository: {{ $('Github Failure Webhook').first().json.body.repo }} Branch: {{ $('Extract AI Response').first().json.branch_name }} Fix Title: {{ $('Extract AI Response').first().json.pr_title }}  Pull Request has been created. Please review and merge: https://github.com/{{ $('Github Failure Webhook').first().json.body.repo }}/pulls Best regards,  AI Self-Healing System
